# Anthony Zang

> Personal site of Anthony Zang — MS CS student at Georgia Tech, AI safety researcher.

## About

Anthony is a Master's student in Computer Science at Georgia Institute of Technology, where his research focuses on AI safety, interpretability, and observability. He works at the Human-Centered AI Lab (EILab) under Dr. Mark Riedl and PhD Candidate Glenn Matlin on persona vectors and humanistic modeling in LLMs. He is also a part-time Technical Staff member at Redwood Research and a Lead Graduate TA for Algorithms (CS 3510).

## Education

- Georgia Institute of Technology — MS Computer Science (Aug 2025 – present)
- Georgia Institute of Technology — BS Computer Science (Aug 2021 – May 2025), Highest Honours

## Current Affiliations

- Human-Centered AI Lab, Georgia Tech — Student Researcher (Sep 2025 – present)
- Redwood Research — Technical Staff, Part-Time (Mar 2026 – present)
- College of Computing, Georgia Tech — Lead Graduate Teaching Assistant of Algorithms, CS 3510 (Aug 2025 – present)

## Past Affiliations

- Datadog — Backend & Infrastructure Software Engineering Intern (May 2025 – Aug 2025)
- DDiSL Lab, Georgia Tech (Dr. Ling Liu) — Student Researcher & Team Lead (Sep 2025 – Dec 2025)
- College of Computing, Georgia Tech — Head TA of Discrete Mathematics, CS 2050 (Jan 2024 – May 2025)
- College of Computing, Georgia Tech — Senior TA of Discrete Mathematics, CS 2050 (Aug 2023 – Dec 2023)
- College of Computing, Georgia Tech — Undergraduate TA of Discrete Mathematics, CS 2050 (Jan 2023 – Aug 2023)
- Team Phoenix Supercomputing Lab VIP, Georgia Tech — Student Researcher (Jan 2024 – May 2025)

## Involvements

- AI Safety Initiative at Georgia Tech — Technical Fellow
- GT Model United Nations — Treasurer & Conference VP
- GT International Ambassadors — Outreach & Finance
- GT Glee Club — Webmaster
- GT Pi Epsilon Phi — Treasurer
- GT Chamber Choir
- GT Motor Sports FSAE
- GT Seek Discomfort
- Yellow Jacket Fencing Club
- GT Gold Fellas — Organiser
